resultList.dtldesc: This residence offers a perfect blend of grand living and urban convenience in one of Ahmedabads most vibrant residential neighbourhoods. Designed for those who appreciate substantial space and a high-quality finish, this independent house provides an exceptional environment for large families seeking a prestigious and well-connected home in East Ahmedabad.Property SpecificationsThis impressive 5 BHK residential house encompasses a generous super area of 3500 sq. ft, with a comfortable carpet area of 2300 sq. ft. The property comes fully furnished, featuring modern fixtures and elegant furniture that create a ready-to-move-in experience. The layout is thoughtfully planned to include five spacious bedrooms and six modern bathrooms, providing an unmatched level of privacy and comfort for all residents. Additionally, the house features two well-positioned balconies that offer views of the surrounding neighbourhood and allow for ample natural light and cross-ventilation. With a construction age of 5 to 10 years, the property is well-maintained and reflects a professional standard of architecture.FacilitiesResidents of this property benefit from a range of facilities designed to ensure a secure and hassle-free lifestyle. The house is equipped with reliable water and electricity connections, supported by the established infrastructure of the Bapunagar locality. For those with vehicles, ample parking space is available on the premises. Being an independent residence, it offers the luxury of complete privacy while being situated within a safe and friendly community. The surrounding environment is well-kept, ensuring a pleasant atmosphere for children and elderly family members alike.LocalityStrategically situated in the prime neighbourhood of Bapunagar, the property is surrounded by a wealth of amenities and robust infrastructure. The area is exceptionally well-connected to major commercial hubs, ensuring a smooth daily commute to other parts of Ahmedabad. Educational requirements are easily met with several reputed institutions, including Mahila Vanijya Mahavidhyalay and Axay High School, located within a short distance. For healthcare, multi-specialty facilities like Tilak Hospital and Apollo Prime Eye Hospitals are accessible in the immediate vicinity. Residents also enjoy proximity to vibrant shopping destinations such as DMart and commercial centres like Pushkar Business Park, ensuring all daily necessities are within easy reach.
